responses.text: The number of people who committed suicide in Japan rose again last year for the first time in more than a decade.
Sakamoto’s main task will be to take comprehensive measures to address the increased suicide rate among women in the wake of the pandemic.
The total number of suicides in Japan in October 2020 was 2,199, higher than the total number of deaths from the coronavirus at that time.
The number of suicides among men in Japan decreased slightly in 2020.
The suicide rate among women in Japan increased by more than 70% in one month compared to the same period in 2019.
Japan's Prime Minister Yoshihide Suga announced the creation of a new "minister of loneliness" in his cabinet to address Japan's record-breaking suicide rate.
Suicide rates among men in Japan increased by almost 22 percent over the same period.
The number of suicides in Japan in 2019 was 20 thousand 169.
The October figures show that the suicide rate among Japanese women rose by 83 percent compared to last October
Experts believe that the social and economic impact of the epidemic has caused many Japanese people to have mental health problems, which is also a factor in the increase in the suicide rate.
Japan's suicide rate hit a record high in 2020, with nearly 21,000 people committing suicide, 750 more than the previous year.
The pandemic disproportionately affects the psychological health of children, adolescents and women
More than 13,000 men committed suicide last year, 135 fewer than the previous year.
The number of suicides in 2020 reached 20,919, the first increase since the financial crisis in 2009.
Japan had the highest suicide rate among developed countries.
Japan has long had the highest suicide rate among the Group of Seven, but South Korea is even higher in Asia.
The suicide rate in one month was unprecedented in Japan since 2015.
Tetsushi Sakamoto is also responsible for saving the country's declining birth rate and reviving the local economy.
The rate of female suicides in Japan has increased by about 15%.
In Japan, more people died from suicide in a month than from COVID-19 complications in all of 2020.
The Covid-19 pandemic has left people out of balance and pushed prosperous countries back decades on the path to an already elusive goal of improving or at least not harming their mental health.
The rise in suicides is evident among women and young people in Japan.
During the pandemic in Japan, the number of suicides among women and children has increased.
Japan's suicide rate in 2017 was 14.9 cases per 100,000 population.
Japan's "one-person" culture, which promotes living alone, is closely related to the Japanese workplace environment and culture.
Suicide rates among women increased by 885 to 6,976 in 2020.
The suicide rate for men increased by 7.4 per cent during the second wave, which is one fifth of the increase for women.
Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas called for an urgent meeting of Palestinian leaders to review the agreement between the United Arab Emirates and Israel.
Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas said the agreements to normalize relations between the UAE and the Zionist regime are an illusion that will not succeed.
Palestinian leaders denounced the agreement on the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates and Israel.
The Abraham Accord was seen by Trump as a major diplomatic achievement and the complete marginalisation of Palestine.
The Abraham agreement actually destroyed decades of consensus and was denounced by Palestinian leaders as a ‘betrayal’.
If Israel and the United Arab Emirates are seeking a solution to peace, it must be done through Ramallah, the Palestinian leadership, and Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas.
Palestinian leaders reiterated their opposition to the "Deal of the Century" plan and everything related to it.

The formal signing of the agreement on normalization of relations between the Zionist regime, the United Arab Emirates and Bahrain in Washington provoked a negative and severe reaction from the Palestinian groups.

Mansour Abbas, another Arab MP for the Knesset, stressed that real peace will be achieved with the end of the Israeli occupation and the establishment of an independent Palestinian state in the West Bank and Gaza with Jerusalem as its capital.
US President Donald Trump repeated a statement that the UAE and Bahrain would be followed by five more Arab countries, as well as an agreement with the Palestinian Authority.
The Bahrain Economic Conference failed because it was boycotted by Palestinian leaders.
The Abraham Accords were perceived by the Palestinian side as a stab in the back.
Abbas told an emergency meeting of the Arab League in Cairo that Israel would have to assume its responsibilities as an occupying power in the Palestinian territories.
The 1948 UN plan for the creation of two independent Israeli and Palestinian states could have led to the creation of a Palestinian state, but Palestinian leaders opposed it.
Palestinian leaders always accepted Saudi Arabia's help, but ignored its advice, according to Bandar bin Sultan.
The Abraham Accord assumed that the Arab world no longer cares about the suffering of the Palestinians, but is content to let its own government embrace Israel based on other common interests.
Peace and security will only come with the end of the occupation and the achievement of the Palestinian people’s rights to freedom, independence and an independent state with Jerusalem.
The Camp David peace plan in 1979 could have also led to the creation of a Palestinian state, but Palestinian leaders continued to oppose and divide the Arab world.
Analysts point out that the Middle East’s anger has seriously overturned the central assumption of the Abraham Accord.
In other countries, cosmetic surgeries such as liposuction and breast prosthesis are at the forefront of cosmetic surgery.
Cosmetic hospitals accounted for more than 30 percent of the total cost of foreign patients last year.
Excessive changes in the face or body by surgery can cause irreparable complications.
Hezi, a Japanese person, went to the mainland for liposuction surgery after learning about the technology through a mainland cosmetic institution's branch in Japan.
Cosmetic surgery is one of the types of plastic surgery that has been done more or less by specialist physicians in the past.
Rhinoplasty or nose surgery can be associated with complications and risks such as swelling, bruising and scar.
The total number of plastic surgeries worldwide increased by 5.4% in 2019, with women accounting for 87.4% of the plastic surgeries.
Turkey is trying to present itself and compete with Iran in rhinoplasty.
The cost of treatment in Korean cosmetic hospitals was a three-fold increase from 52.5 billion won in 2012.
The aim of cosmetic surgery was to remove the fundamental defects in the face or body of the applicants or to repair the defects created in the appearance of people due to accidents such as burns.
Cosmetic surgery, dental work, and corneal grafts are among the medical services offered by Iran's medical centers.
Nearly 50,000 foreigners visited South Korea for cosmetic surgery last year.
The economic value of mainland tourists coming to Taiwan for cosmetic and medical tourism is estimated to be several billion yuan.
Nose surgeries are the most common cosmetic surgery in Iran.
Foreigners receiving treatment in Korean cosmetic hospitals accounted for 12.3% of all foreign patients.
Most equipment needed for plastic and cosmetic surgery, such as implants and prostheses, have serial numbers that can be traced on the manufacturer's website.
The field of plastic and cosmetic surgery is not very dependent on drugs with shortages.
Some countries have done effective activities in the field of medical tourism and travel to Iran to perform rhinoplasty.
Cosmetic surgery can bring the face or body closer to the mental ideals of people and relieve them of a problem that causes some discomfort.
Rhode J. Rohrich, a cosmetic surgeon in Texas, saw more patients than usual during the coronavirus.
Rhinoplasty congresses can be very important in the Middle East and the world.
There are no exact statistics about nose surgeries in Iran.
The 10th Congress of Advanced Rhinoplasty will be held in Imam Khomeini Hospital from October 21 to November 22, 2019.
Qiaoren Park will provide a safe and convenient recreational space for the public and children.
A flowerbed with a bridge will be built in the "pocket square" on Enthusiasts street to make it interesting for children to play.
A trail will be opened on the park side to make it more convenient for residents to enter and exit.
The access line in Xindian Qiaoren Park has adopted barrier-free design to provide a more diverse recreational environment.
The Xindian District Office promotes the concept of participatory budgeting, allowing the community and children to participate together in planning a pocket park.
The city built 47 pocket parks last year, and this year will build or upgrade 50.
A small green space of only 500 square meters has been installed with three leisure seats and some small outdoor fitness equipment at the corner of Fuxing East Road and Zhonghua Road.
The New Taipei City Government set up an inter-bureau working group in April 2019 to promote the "Park Inclusion or Aging Improvement Plan".
Creating very small or pocket parks is a solution to offset part of the lack of green spaces in urban centers, residential complexes and other areas of the city.
The development and construction of neighborhood parks and urban green spaces aims to fulfill citizens' recreational needs.
3 million yuan of funds will be sought to open up the Pocket Park in Tamsui District.
The pocket park is designed with climbing game facilities as the main axis, with swings, bars, etc.
The Huishan Garden at 207 Lintong Road has an area of only 408 square meters, but has exquisite and small green products, and fitness trails.
Benches, urns, and autonomous lighting on solar panels will be installed throughout the territory of the "pocket square".
Pocket parks can be a refuge against the city crowds as well as a place for rest and relaxation.
The goal of allowing citizens to go out 500 meters to see a 3,000 square meter park green space has been basically achieved.
The playground features a "jump house" game and a jump color change to the floor mat.
Yahya Sotoudeh Nia said pocket parks or small parks are small-scale urban open spaces that large cities and cities go to them to create green space.
Gorgan Municipality will emphasize on creating space for children and installing playgrounds in the pocket parks.
Putuo plans to build a new 10,000 li community green space with a total area of 14,930 square meters, consisting of forests, wetlands, and pocket parks.
The game facilities in Xindian Qiaoren Park are too old and do not meet safety regulations.
Gorgan Municipality will continue its efforts to build and operate 12 pocket parks until the end of the year.
Valiasr city has a high population density and the park is intended to provide a suitable context for recreation and entertainment of residents and families.
More than 2,300 square meters of public green space has been built in the area of 1501 North Xinshi Road, Jiangwan Town.
For some Russian girls, watching Turkish TV series ends up getting into Turkish brothels or unhappy marriages with Turks.
Turkey is one of the countries that has brought its unique culture into the film industry, showing the customs, thoughts, beliefs and way of life of its people.

New series of Turkish soap operas were very popular among viewers around the world: they are bought for hire even in Arab and Latin American countries - regions more accustomed to exporting their own "telenovelas".
More than 150 Turkish series have been exported to more than 100 countries, according to the Turkish Ministry of Culture and Tourism.
The ban on the Turkish TV series "Black Love" sparked a flurry of outraged comments on social media.
Experts criticize Turkish actors for hypocrisy and immoral profiteering, as they condemn violence against women in real life but portray it in their series.
Turkish people say that the films do not look like ordinary people's lives and are not close followers anymore.
Turkish love story “Noor ”, which aired between 2005 and 2007, reached an unprecedented audience of 92 million people.
The home theater network in Iran creates an atmosphere similar to Turkish series, with the same crises and shortcomings.
In most Turkish TV series, women and girls are portrayed as prey to the rich and mafia gangs, or as victims of violence and aggression.
Chile, Argentina, Mexico, China, Russia, Korea and Japan are the largest customers of Turkish series, respectively, according to a report in The Guardian.
Turkish TV series has been broadcast as the country’s soft power in recent years, especially on the television of Arab countries.
In Russia, it is proposed to ban the broadcast of Turkish TV series and films on television.
Turkish series draw the mind of the audience into delusional thoughts and do not have any luggage in practice, based on a vulgar culture in a romantic frame.

The influence of Turkish series in many countries of the world has led many viewers of these series to visit the magnificent mansions and palaces that were once the location of their favorite stories.
Turkish TV shows are considered close to the life, culture, and mentality of a simple resident of Uzbekistan, despite being "foreign".
Actors in Turkish TV series have a side income of several hundred thousand lira a year due to their fame.
Turkish series, which until recently could only be visited through satellite channels, were mixed with the home screen space due to lack of supervision.
Israelis are “addicted” to Turkish shows, particularly the series “Bride of Istanbul”.
The technology of extracting oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars will help create a breathable atmosphere for astronauts.
The atmosphere of Mars is 95% carbon dioxide.
An experimental instrument MOXIE, the size of a toaster, extracted oxygen on board the Rover Perseverance.
Future explorers will depend on the production of fuel on Mars to make the journey home.
Moxie separates oxygen atoms from carbon dioxide molecules, and the resulting carbon monoxide is released into the Martian atmosphere as an exhaust gas.
NASA’s new rover has received oxygen for the first time on the Red Planet.
Positive results from these experiments will bring Mars missions like Elon Musk’s Mars project one step closer to landing humans on the Red Planet.
Perseverance will conduct other forward-looking experiments on Mars, including generating oxygen from the carbon-rich atmosphere of Mars.
Getting that much oxygen from Earth to Mars would be difficult and expensive.
The Martian atmosphere is mostly composed of carbon dioxide (about 96%), argon (about 2%) and nitrogen (about 2%).
The rover conducted the corresponding test on April 20, the 60th day since the landing of the mission to Mars
Future versions of the technology could work on Mars to produce breathable oxygen.
The MOXIE system can convert 96% of the carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere into oxygen.
Oxygen is not just what humans breathe, rocket fuel depends on oxygen.
A drone is installed on the Perseverance device to test the possibility of flying in the rarefied atmosphere of Mars.
Ultimately producing oxygen on Mars could be in a small space as a building and could not meet the human need for oxygen to live on Mars.

The atmospheric pressure of Mars is less than 1% of that of Earth, and the most important component is carbon dioxide (95.32%), the others are nitrogen (2.7%), argon (1.6%), and oxygen only accounts for 0.13%.
Oxygen on Mars is in a related form.
Mars has all the resources to get a small amount of oxygen.
An oxygen exchanger weighing about 1 ton, the next generation and more powerful than Maxi, could produce enough oxygen in the long run.
Experts plan to develop installations for the extraction of oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars or other sources for future missions.
Scientists believe that this technology will allow to receive and store oxygen on Mars in the future.
NASA is planning to send humans to Mars and needs to build a base with breathable air on the planet.
Converting the carbon dioxide in the atmosphere into an oxygen device will help solve the problem of oxygen resources necessary for humans to establish a permanent base on Mars.
The company said in April it was facing a lawsuit from 100,000 plaintiffs in the United States alleging that Roundup and other glyphosate-based herbicides caused them to develop cancer.
Analysts estimate that the settlement could eventually cost Bayer between $8 billion and $12 billion.
The Bayer Board of Supervisors has just discussed and voted on the settlement, which includes a $2 billion provision for future claims.
Bayer's attempts to limit future liability for whether the product could cause cancer suffered a setback in court.
Bayer’s quotations have been declining for 14 months since the completion of the transaction with Monsanto.
Bayer has settled 88,500 of 125,000 claims.
Bayer pays a fixed amount of compensation for outstanding claims, included in the tens of billions of dollars.
The court of appeal upheld the first-instance decision that Roundup herbicide contained the carcinogen “glyphosate”.
Bayer Group has reached a settlement agreement on its Roundup herbicide carcinogen lawsuit, the amount of the settlement will be between 10.1 billion and 10.9 billion US dollars.
75% of the current legal disputes against the Roundup brand herbicide will be closed, totaling about 125,000 cases.
Hundreds of lawsuits have been filed against the company over the use of glyphosphate in the Roundup herbicide and its alleged health effects
Bayer bought Monsanto, the producer of the herbicide Roundup, for $63 billion.
Federal Judge Vince Chhabria said the settlement proposal was “clearly unreasonable ” for Roundup users who had not yet been diagnosed with cancer.
Roundup weed killer has been sold in more than 160 countries.
Bayer will set aside an additional $1.1 billion to establish and fund a panel to assess whether the product causes cancer to help influence the outcome of future litigation.
Bayer has made “substantial progress” in resolving legal proceedings against herbicide carcinogens.
Bayer has lost three lawsuits related to Roundup and appealed the decision.
Bayer’s stock price has fallen 42% since the acquisition was completed in June 2018.
Bayer will pay about $9.5 billion to settle claims filed by lawyers representing some 95,000 plaintiffs.
Bayer has reached a verbal agreement to end a large portion of the roughly 125,000 cancer-related lawsuits that Roundup herbicides have triggered in the United States.
The US Department of Justice demanded from the German company Bayer to sell assets worth about $9 billion.
A California jury indicted Monsanto, saying the company had to warn its customers about the dangers of using two herbicides, Roundup and Ranger Pro.
Bayer will set aside $8 billion to resolve all current cases, including those pending.

Italian authorities have confirmed that the painting found last December at the Ricci Oddi Gallery of Modern Art in the northern Italian city of Piacenza is indeed a Portrait of a Lady by Gustav Klimt.
The painting was stolen 23 years ago from a gallery in Piacenza, northern Italy in 1997.
The painting was painted by Klimt in 1916-1917.
“Portrait of a Lady” is valued at $66 million according to BBC News.
Gardeners found a black bag containing the stolen painting while cleaning the ivy on the museum's exterior wall.
Prosecutor Ornilla Chika confirmed the painting's authenticity.
The painting lay in a niche behind a partition in a black bag hidden by thick vegetation.

Thieves of a stolen painting by Gustav Klimt, which was recently discovered in the same Italian gallery where it was stolen after 22 years, have admitted to returning the artwork to the scene of the theft.
Portrait of a Lady, a $500 million painting, was stolen from the Ricci Oddi Gallery of Modern Art on 22 February 1997.
The Ricci-Oddi Museum of Modern Art in Italy has discovered a painting by Austrian painter Gustav Klimt that was stolen 23 years ago, worth 60 million euros.
The portrait was painted by Klimt to forget the pain of a young Vienna woman's sudden death.
The Ricciotti Gallery in Piacenza, northern Italy, acquired the Portrait of a Lady in 1925.
The painting, Portrait of a Lady, was stolen by thieves with a fishing line in Klimt's later years.
Giuseppe Ricci Odi bought the painting in 1925 and kept it in the gallery.
Portrait of a Woman was revealed to be the only work Klimt had ever painted on any of his other works, about 10 months before her disappearance in 1996.
In February 1997, shortly before the opening of the exhibition dedicated to Klimt, the painting was stolen, later only its forgeries were found
Climatic zones of agriculture in Ukraine are shifting to the north by hundreds of kilometers.
Rainfall patterns and other environmental conditions are changing globally as a result of climate change.
Rising temperatures, increased rainfall and more extreme weather events have affected arable land, crops and livestock.
Two-thirds of the territory of Ukraine will become a zone of risky farming due to climate change.
During the continuous heavy rain in July and August this year, many bitter gourds are soaked in water and their roots are rotting, and the fruit falling rate is as high as 80%.
Climate change is putting food security at risk.
The new agro-climatic region will move far north and take the place of the southern, and even warmer agro-climatic regions will appear in the south of the country.
The agricultural laboratory hopes to solve the problem of crop growth and harvest through different aspects of adjusting crop growth and coping with the damage caused by climate change.

Climate change causes global temperature increases and uneven rainfall, disrupting crop growth, affecting the original habitats of ecosystems, and affecting the yield and quality of agricultural products.
Global warming continues at its current pace, food production areas will see significant changes in rainfall and temperature.
Waterlogging and reviving agriculture mixed with forest plantations can be done in Belarus.
The Taichung Agricultural Improvement Station of the Council of Agriculture of the Executive Yuan tried to use mushroom waste materials to combat climate change.
Climate change leads to the destruction of agriculture and forces people to move to other places or countries.
Climate change has changed the conditions of crop growth and made its future unpredictable in most parts of the world.
The climate in Latvia is changing so fast that the weather conditions in the country will be completely different in the coming years.
Climate change can change how soil is absorbed.
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change report warns of losses for farmers due to warming, particularly in hot countries.
Russia should introduce new technologies in agriculture and use new crops to adapt to climate change.
Strengthening land use rights and establishing weather, crop yields and seasonal climate warning systems can help reduce carbon emissions.
Climate change could have a negative impact on soil, posing a threat to water resources and crop production.
Climate change has directly or indirectly affected the lives of 7.5 billion people on the planet.
A Separation won the Golden Bear for Best Film and the Silver Bear for Best Actor and Actress at the 61st Berlin International Film Festival.
The film "Evil Does Not Exist" discusses the theme of the lack of freedom of intimate life in a totalitarian society.
The film "There Is No Evil", directed by Iranian dissident director Mohammad Rasoulof, won the Golden Bear Award for Best Picture at the Berlin Film Festival.
Iranian cinema has won the Golden Bear twice with the films “A Separation from Simin ” and“ Taxi ”.
Mohammad Rasoulof was not allowed to leave Iran and still won with the film "The Devil Does Not Exist".

Iranian filmmakers such as Sohrab Shahid-Sales and Asghar Farhadi received Silver Bear and Golden Bear at the Berlin Film Festival for Dead Nature and Nader and Simin ’ s Divorce in 1974 and 2011, respectively.
Asghar Farhadi won the Silver Bear for Best Director for the film About Elly and the Golden Bear for the film The Separation of Nader from Simin from the Berlin International Film Festival.
Asghar Farhadi is the first Iranian director to win an Academy Award.
“There Is No Evil” explores the death penalty in Iran.
The festival is regarded as the most political among the prestigious film festivals around the world
French naval and shipping officials said the British coast guard had rescued more than 120 migrants trying to cross the English Channel in seven small boats.
Rescue operations began on Tuesday morning to transport the survivors to a hospital, but a man drowned and died before the rescue, followed by a woman and two children who died of cardiac arrest.
A police helicopter in the area sent a tugboat to help the people on the boat.
Britain and France have signed a new deal to stop illegal migrants from venturing across the English Channel by stepping up patrols and deploying technology on French beaches.
More than 60 migrants were taken in several boats trying to cross the English Channel to reach the UK on the day after Christmas.
17 Iranian migrants made their way to British shores early Tuesday after hijacking a French fishing boat and crossing the English Channel, but were stopped by coast guard forces.

The English Channel, between France and England and part of the Atlantic Ocean, is one of the most frequented waterways in the world, and crossing it by boat and small vessels is very dangerous, especially in winter.
Britain’s immigration minister said the government was working faster with France to toughen immigration measures to stop migrants crossing the Channel illegally.
British services intercepted more than 80 migrants trying to reach the shores of the United Kingdom by boat through the English Channel.
Around 100 asylum-seekers, most of whom claim to be Iranian nationals, made their way to Britain’s shores via the English Channel in November.
Save the Children said the English Channel should not be a graveyard for children.
French authorities intercepted 19 migrants trying to sneak into Britain in the English Channel yesterday night.
Over 100 migrants and asylum seekers who say they are Iranian have tried to cross the English Channel to Britain in small boats over the past three weeks.
The number of French patrols will be doubled, and they will receive drones and radars according to the new agreement.
British border guards detained in the English Channel four boats with illegal migrants who were trying to reach the shores of the United Kingdom.

Five members of a family called Irannejad, including 9-year-old Anita Irannejad, 6-year-old Armin Irannejad and 15-month-old Artin Irannejad, died in the recent sinking of refugee boats in the English Channel.
The number of small boats carrying irregular migrants crossing the Channel was described as “appalling ” and “unacceptably high” by the immigration minister.
Lodon intends to strengthen cooperation with France and the French coastal patrol services in order to make the illegal crossing of the English Channel “impossible”.
Stratolaunch is designed to launch small rockets from the stratosphere into low Earth orbit.
Stratolaunch Systems was founded by Microsoft co-founder Paul Allen.
Stratolaunch Systems conducted the first flight tests of the world's largest aircraft Stratolaunch on Saturday in the West of the United States.
The wingspan of the Stratolaunch Model 351 is 117 meters.
Stratolaunch Systems had expressed the hope that Stratolaunch will be officially put into use by 2020.
The central part of the Stratolaunch aircraft is designed to mount space rockets
The Stratolaunch Model 351 aircraft has the possibility of carrying and launching from it in one flight up to three Pegasus XL launch vehicles.
The Stratolaunch aircraft is equipped with 28 wheels
The first flight took place on April 13.
The construction of the Stratolaunch Model 351 aircraft was carried out in a specially built for this purpose in 2012 in Mojave giant hangar.
A medium-lift carrier rocket, capable of placing 3,400 kilograms of cargo in low Earth orbit, is scheduled to launch in 2022.
The aircraft can simultaneously carry up to three Orbital ATK Pegasus XL missiles and put into orbit from an altitude of about nine thousand meters.
Stratolaunch completed its first liftoff and flew over California for about two and a half hours after taking off from the Mojave Air Base.
The Soviet transport aircraft An-225 ("Mriya") has a significantly inferior wing span to the Scaled Composites Stratolaunch Model 351 aircraft.
The aircraft will carry one missile at the first stage, in the future - up to three missiles fixed in the lower part of the fuselage.
The Stratolaunch Roc aircraft landed, smoothly touching the surface of the strip with all its 28 wheels, after its second test flight.
Its wingspan is 117 meters and its height is 15 meters.
The weight of the Stratolaunch Model 351 together with a full tank of fuel is 340 tons.
Initially, the first flight of the Stratolaunch was planned for the summer of this year, but it had to be postponed.
The aircraft took to the sky from an airfield near Los Angeles.
The project of the Stratolaunch Model 351 aircraft was announced in December 2011.
The aircraft has a wingspan of 117.3 meters.
The beginning of flight tests of the Stratolaunch Model 351 aircraft is scheduled for the end of 2017, and the first demonstration space launch from it - in 2019.
The Stratolaunch is equipped with six engines from the Boeing 747 aircraft.
The Stratolaunch Model 351 carrier aircraft is the largest aircraft in history, having a wingspan of 117 m and a length of 73 m.
Riders got off their bikes because of a girl with a poster at the “Tour de France”.
A major crash has been reported at the 2021 Tour de France in France.
A fan with a poster provoked a mass accident at the Tour de France
German cyclist Tony Martin crashed into the poster, which entailed a chain reaction of falls.
Tour de France spokesman Pierre Yves told AFP that charges will be brought against the woman
The cardboard reached onto the track without the spectator knowing it, causing the accident.
The Tour de France organizers filed an official complaint against the fan who caused the crash.
Experts believe that this is one of the biggest accidents in the history of the Tour de France.
Medical staff entered the competition and treated cyclists who were injured and bruised after the accident.
Injuries of varying severity were received by 21 participants of the Tour de France.
One of the fans, trying to show the poster on the camera, went with him on the road during the first stage of the Tour de France.
A bigger accident happened about 7.6 kilometers later.
French police are looking for the culprit of the collapse of cyclists in the "Tour de France".
Both incidents took place during the opening phase of the Tour de France.
Organizers of the Tour de France have withdrawn a lawsuit against a woman guilty of a serious accident on the track during the first stage of the 2021 race.
Police conducted interviews with eyewitnesses to find out where the woman might have gone
One of the victims could not continue to participate in the first stage of the Tour de France.
The two astronauts will stay on the space station for one to four months.
The Crew Dragon has four windows through which the crew can observe the Earth, the Moon and other objects of the solar system.
SpaceX launched the Demo-2 mission on its second attempt
SpaceX ’ s crewed Dragon capsule was launched to the International Space Station about two months ago.
The Crew Dragon spacecraft will launch from the United States on May 27.
The propulsion system in the event of a crash and failure of the Dragon Crew Space Capsule uses emergency engines to activate the capsule after launch and return astronauts safely back to Earth.
SpaceX successfully launched the Crew Dragon spacecraft with two astronauts of the US space agency NASA on board.
American astronauts have been traveling to the space station aboard Russian rockets since 2011.
The mission is called Demo-2 and is still a test, despite the fact that the flight is manned.

NASA astronauts, who will travel to the space station using the Dragon Crew capsule, are learning how to steer and control the capsule, because the technology used in SpaceX's equipment is different from NASA's.
SpaceX's Crew Dragon capsule took NASA astronauts to the International Space Station on May 30 and is now docked at the space lab.
This is SpaceX ’ s second manned mission.
NASA also uses a flight simulator system to familiarize astronauts with the environment of the space capsule while traveling in space.
Astronauts sent into space aboard the Crew Dragon capsule arrived at the International Space Station after 19 hours.
SpaceX officials hope that with the remainder of the tests, the first crewed launch of the Crew Dragon capsule to the International Space Station will take place within two months next year.
Experts have embedded a special heat shield in the body of the space capsule so that after completing the mission and returning to Earth, it can be used again for future space missions.
Crew Dragon launched a Falcon 9 launch vehicle into Earth orbit
Dragon spacecraft in August carried two astronauts back to Earth and the International Space Station to complete the first manned landing attempt.
The mission is called Demo-2, the previous "Demo 1", and there was no crew, so this is the first manned mission.
SpaceX has adjusted the order of operation of the mission and how to get in and out of the top of the hatch under different circumstances.
Two NASA astronauts, Bob Behnken and Doug Hurley, are set to return to Earth aboard Dragon 2 after a 2-month mission.
The Crew Dragon is a commercially built and operated spacecraft designed for crew.
The Ontario Superior Court of Justice, Canada, ruled that the plane was hit by two missiles shortly after take-off in Tehran.
Iran has submitted a final technical report on the downing of flight 752, which Ukraine has explicitly objected to.
The families of the victims of Ukrainian Airlines Flight 752 have filed a lawsuit against three top Iranian security and military officials.
Iran's Foreign Ministry has called the verdict issued by a Canadian court in the case of the shooting down of a Ukrainian plane on January 8, 2020 "without legal basis."
The Ukrainian plane had a flight license from the Iranian military but was shot down minutes later, raising questions about the coordination between military and civilian institutions.

The Canadian government’s report “reveals the Islamic Republic’s lack of attention to human lives, failure to speak the facts, inability to bring justice and repression to the families of those killed,” according to the Association of Families of the Victims of Flight PS752.
Iran initially denied the Western accusations, but later admitted that the Iranian military shot down the plane unintentionally.
Foreign Minister Mohammad Javad Zarif said he is still ashamed and sorry for the downing of Flight 752.
Ukraine is also investigating why the skies of Iran were not closed during a time of readiness for full-scale conflict, despite the risk to civilian aircraft.
The Supreme Court of the Canadian province of Ontario ruled that Iran should compensate families who sued for the plane crash that killed 176 people
The third round of talks with Iran on the downing of flight 752 will be held in Kiev.
Canada will not stop pressuring Iran to hold it accountable for the downing of the Ukrainian plane.
Iran's Civil Aviation Authority released an investigation report on the crash of Ukraine International Airlines Flight 752 on the evening of July 11 local time.
Iran says the downing of the plane was caused by "human error".
A court in Ontario, Canada, ruled that Iran's actions were deliberate "terrorism" based on written evidence provided by the family.
The courts of the Islamic Republic of Iran are the only competent authority to deal with the incident, according to Gholamhossein Esmaeili.
The ship was escorted to the port of Wonsan.
North Korean border guards detained a Russian fishing vessel about 55 nautical miles from the territory of the DPRK.
North Korea seized a Russian fishing vessel with 17 sailors on board on the night of July 17.
On board the Xianghailin-8 were 17 sailors - 15 Russians and two citizens of South Korea.
The representative of the Embassy of the DPRK in Moscow said that given the good relations between Russia and the DPRK, after the check, the ship will be released to Russia.

35 countries are involved in the creation of the experimental tokamak reactor ITER, including the EU countries, Russia, the United States, India, China, South Korea, and Japan.

The International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor (ITER) is the world’s largest nuclear fusion plant.
